com.pax.poslink

Class PaymentResponse.PaymentTransInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
      • com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentTransInfo
  • Enclosing class:
    PaymentResponse

    public static class PaymentResponse.PaymentTransInfo
extends TransInfo

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String EdcType
      The EDC type returned for CREDIT/DEBIT prompt is on.
      java.lang.String EwicBalance
      eWIC Balance information group, refer to section eWIC Balance Definition.
      java.lang.String EwicBenefitExpd
      eWIC card expiry Date, format is YYYYMMDD.
      java.lang.String EwicDetail
      eWIC Detail information group, refer to section eWIC Detail Definition.
      java.lang.String OrigTip
      The original tip amount for CREDIT ADJUSTMENT.
      java.lang.String PrintLine1
      Additional lines for printing from host.
      java.lang.String PrintLine2
      Additional lines for printing from host.
      java.lang.String PrintLine3
      Additional lines for printing from host.
      java.lang.String PrintLine4
      Additional lines for printing from host.
      java.lang.String PrintLine5
      Additional lines for printing from host.
      java.lang.String ReversalStatus
      Reversal status:
      java.lang.String ReverseAmount
      Reverse amount, the format is $$$$CC
      java.lang.String TokenSerialNum
      It is used to specify the serial number for the account where the card token is stored.

    • Field Detail

      • OrigTip

        public java.lang.String OrigTip
        The original tip amount for CREDIT ADJUSTMENT.

        Attribute: n..9

      • EdcType

        public java.lang.String EdcType
        The EDC type returned for CREDIT/DEBIT prompt is on. Once DEBIT selected on terminal for T00 command, “DEBIT” as this field will be returned.

        Attribute: ans..16

      • PrintLine1

        public java.lang.String PrintLine1
        Additional lines for printing from host.

        Attribute: ans..32

      • PrintLine2

        Additional lines for printing from host.

        Attribute: ans..32

        Attribute: ans..32

      • EwicBenefitExpd

        public java.lang.String EwicBenefitExpd
        eWIC card expiry Date, format is YYYYMMDD.

        Attribute: n8

      • EwicBalance

        public java.lang.String EwicBalance
        eWIC Balance information group, refer to section eWIC Balance Definition.

        Attribute: ans..256

      • EwicDetail

        public java.lang.String EwicDetail
        eWIC Detail information group, refer to section eWIC Detail Definition.

        Attribute: ans..256

      • ReverseAmount

        public java.lang.String ReverseAmount
        Reverse amount, the format is $$$$CC

        Attribute: n..12

      • ReversalStatus

        public java.lang.String ReversalStatus
        Reversal status:

        0 – Aborted
        1 – Timeout
        2 – Reversal failed
        3 – Reversal success

        Attribute: n1

      • TokenSerialNum

        public java.lang.String TokenSerialNum
        It is used to specify the serial number for the account where the card token is stored.

        Attribute: ans..10
